positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring a group of diverse woodland creatures—foxes, deer, hares, and bears—gathered together in a whimsical, magical forest clearing. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern flat vector design, utilizing thick black outlines, limited but rich color palettes (deep forest greens, sapphire blues, burnt orange, and ivory accents). The composition must place the animals in a central, circular arrangement against a simple background of stylized foliage and glowing, abstract floral elements. The overall feel should be enchanting, celebratory, and inherently cheerful. Focus on strong silhouettes and clear, scalable graphic elements perfect for printing on apparel. Full body shots, minimalist rendering, highly detailed yet clean.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, text, logo, signature, watermark, artifacts, cropped, low resolution, extra limbs, mutated, ugly, messy, noisy, out of frame, complex background, photorealistic, bokeh, grain, muted colors
